PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Continued To Jan-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for the Petitioner.

Mr. Tomases requested a six week continuance, which the Court granted. The Court informed Mr.
Tomases that if the defects were not corrected, the matter would be taken off calendar. Both matters were continued to January 7, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Continued To Nov-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kimberly Gila (Daughter of the Decedent) appeared. No appearance was made by the Petitioner nor the Attorney.

The Court stated that the original petitiion was incomplete, that nothing had been filed and no contact with the Examiner had taken place. An Order to show cause will be issued to the attorney as to why nothing has happened on this matter. The return date is November 26, 2007. The Court suggested that Ms. Gila contact the attorney.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR#11055. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
